extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET Romain won Stage 12 after FROOME Chris cracked for the first time since 2012 in the final 200m, allowing ARU Fabio to take yellow by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: FROOME first responded failure since 2012 occurred final 200m on 20%+ ramps, not earlier sustained climbs where Sky controlled.
Team Sky's camper crash on pre-climb descent saw peloton wait rather than attack yellow jersey, suggesting collective fatigue not sportsmanship.
LANDA appeared stronger than FROOME on Peyresourde without breathing hard, revealing Sky's protected rider hierarchy may be tactical liability.
QUINTANA dropped 4:01 back after briefly chatting with CONTADOR showing no legs, confirming he's out of GC contention mid-race.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Lost 22 seconds in final 200m for first time since 2012, admitted no legs on 20%+ finish ramps despite team control
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: Only attack since 2012 that Froome couldn't respond to, took yellow despite losing teammate Fuglsang mid-stage
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Looked effortlessly stronger than team leader Froome on Peyresourde, not even breathing hard at finish
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: Extended KOM lead to 40 points with tactical point picking, team support from sprinter Matthews securing jersey
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Dropped to 4:01 deficit, visible capitulation when chatting with Contador before getting distanced
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: Struggled through stage with two broken left arm bones before presumably abandoning at finish
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: negative: Took unnecessary descent risks causing camper crash that caught Froome/Nieve in yellow jersey group
